title: Tomtaru's Cobblemon & Immersive Engineering Tweaks
description: A mod that aims to integrate Cobblemon with Immersive Engineering
body:
![Aprigel Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7792e1afea782ccd020e2249a0e74e13d1d9c262.png)
---
Do you like Cobblemon?

Do you like Immersive Engineering?

Do you wish they had some integration with each other?

Look no further than Tomtaru's Cobblemon & Immersive Engineering Tweaks!

# **Features**

- The ability to press Pokéballs (all basic colors) on a metal press from a single apricorn.
- Pressing Pokéball frames out of Aluminum that can then be dyed or sprayed with ApriGel into the different Pokéballs.
- Pressing a Netherite Pokéball frame to craft the illustrious Master ball.
- Doubling the yield of evolution stones by Crushing them.
- Fully automatable Pokéball production for ANY Pokéball you want.
